name: strata
description: Keeps a project's documentation in step with what it actually does, by recording decisions, specs, issues, runbooks, and layered memory as plain Markdown under .strata/ and bringing it current on one save command.

interface.shortDescription: Keeps project docs in step with the code
interface.longDescription: Use Strata to capture and update a project's decisions, specs, issues, runbooks, and layered memory as plain Markdown under .strata/, so several AI coding agents share one current picture of the project and one save command keeps it that way.
defaultPrompt: Set up Strata memory in this repo.
Load Strata state and continue the last task.
Capture this failure as Strata memory.
